theory.technical_interpretation: Definition of Φ𝑇𝑍𝑃 is an algebraic definition, written Φ𝑇𝑍𝑃=min. It is an algebraic definition expressing the quantity directly in terms of the variables on its right-hand side. It is built from m, n, defining Φ𝑇𝑍𝑃. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
